name: Sketchflow.ai
description: « Turn an idea, description, or reference image into a complete web or mobile interface with screens, user flows, and interactive prototypes. The tool generates multi-page mockups and offers customizable styles

name: WriteHybrid AI Humanizer
description: « AI that rewrites your texts to achieve a more fluid and natural style, adapted to human reading. This gives you content that is ready to be published, such as articles, reports, or long documents. Ability to work continuously on multiple texts

name: Png AI
description: « Quickly generates PNG images from simple descriptions or existing files, with support for transparent backgrounds and various styles. The tool also offers remix features to quickly combine or reinterpret your images

name: Kirkify AI
description: « Turn a photo into a “Kirkified” image inspired by the wave of viral memes in just a few clicks. Upload a JPG or PNG, apply the signature effect, and export a visual ready to be shared on your social networks

name: ColorPage Lab
description: « Create coloring pages from text or images you upload, with crisp outlines suitable for printing. The tool offers several layout styles for clear drawings, perfect for children or creative paper projects

name: ZenMux
description: « Access all leading AI models (GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok-4) through a single API compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic. The platform aggregates official providers through intelligent routing (API) to balance quality and cost

name: Airbrush
description: « Quickly remove the background from your photos and get professional transparent PNGs. Then replace them with colored backgrounds, predefined or AI-generated backgrounds

name: PhotoCat Image Extender
description: « Enlarge your images or their backgrounds while maintaining sharpness and detail for different publication formats. You can widen a landscape, add space around a portrait, or adapt a visual to the requirements of social media platforms (without visible distortion)

name: MiniMax M2.1
description: « An open-source model optimized for autonomous coding that rivals Claude Sonnet 4.5 while costing 10 times less. Specialized in multilingual coding, tool usage, and long-horizon planning

name: JoyFun AI
description: « Turn text or images into short, dynamic clips directly from your browser (no registration required). This platform has many tools, including tools to swap faces in a video

name: ReelMuse AI
description: « Centralize all your content creation on a single platform. This all-in-one tool generates videos (from text or images), AI music, and artistic images. It also offers advanced features such as lip sync

name: IQuest-Coder-V1
description: « An open-source model with 40 billion parameters specializing in code that outperforms Claude Sonnet with an 81% success rate on SWE-Bench. Its architecture, trained on rest evolution, guarantees professional-quality code

name: Syllaby.io
description: « Create faceless videos with AI avatars and voices. This AI can write the script and generate a complete video from a simple idea. You can then schedule publication on multiple social networks from an integrated calendar
